div1.entryFree: Easiness, freedom from emotion, evenness of temper, unconcernedness: if we suffer, out of our e. and childish pity to one man's honour, this contagious sickness, H8 V, 3, 25. that shall lend a kind of e. to the next abstinence, Hml. III, 4, 166. custom hath made it in him a property of e. V, 1, 76.
